response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrated C++ development experience on Windows and has no visible exposure to fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domains — both mandatory requirements. Their work history is dominated by JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web/mobile stacks, with only a brief, non-financial C++ stint in LabWindows™/CVI, which does not meet the 5–10 year Windows C++ requirement.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Active open-source contributor with tooling and infrastructure expertise
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through workshops and talks
concerns: No evidence of 5–10 years of Windows-based C++ development in capital markets
Zero mention of SQL Server, Oracle, or fixed income derivatives domain knowledge
Primary tech stack is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang, not C++ or financial systems
